subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-20 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: It is the prerogative of God to contravene the rules of humanity. Indeed, it befits and power and purpose of God to violate the customs and practices of humankind
subcodes.first_line_orig: لِله خرق العوائد خرق عادات و رسومات بَرازندهٴ قدرت و ارادهٴ الهی است
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
